input.background: Determine whether numbers in the exercise are parameters or statistics based on a study of breast cancer cases in California.
input.question: There were 18,800 new cases of female breast cancer in the state of California in 2005.

new_cases.description: The number of new female breast cancer cases in California in 2005.

state.description: The state where the study on breast cancer cases was conducted.

year.description: The year in which the breast cancer cases were recorded.

gender.description: The gender of the population being studied for breast cancer cases.
